name: Members Trust Federal Credit Union
description_short: Members Trust Federal Credit Union is a full-service credit union serving Houston Heights and Stephenville, TX since 1936, offering loans, savings, checking, and digital banking.
description_long:
Members Trust of the Southwest Federal Credit Union has operated for nearly 90 years with a foundational philosophy of "members helping members" in a professional, friendly environment. The institution is rooted in two Texas communities—Houston Heights and Stephenville—where it has built its reputation as a trusted local financial partner. As a full-service credit union, it maintains the cooperative structure typical of the credit union industry, meaning members are technically owners rather than customers of a for-profit bank.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products across lending and deposit categories. Loan products include auto loans (rates as low as 3.49%), personal loans (from 10.75%), RV loans (3.49%), mortgages with multiple options (conventional, construction, refinance, cash-out), business loans, and credit cards. On the savings side, members can access checking accounts, money market accounts (up to 0.95% APY), and certificate accounts (up to 4.02% APY). The institution emphasizes online and mobile banking capabilities alongside traditional branch services.

The credit union distinguishes itself through local community presence with physical branches in two Texas markets, first-time homebuyer mortgage programs with flexible terms (FICOs as low as 620, up to 97% financing through a mortgage partner), and no-closing-cost mortgage options. Their mortgage offerings include both in-house lending and partnerships to expand member options. The institution positions itself as a relationship-based lender rather than a mass-market provider, emphasizing personalized guidance through the home buying process.

Members Trust functions as a traditional banking alternative for customers seeking community-focused financial services. However, geographic service limitations to Texas (Houston and Stephenville areas) and lack of published competitive rate comparisons against national banks or other credit unions may impact member perception of value. The website contains current promotional content (February-March 2026) and educational resources, suggesting active digital engagement, though specific membership requirements and eligibility criteria are not fully detailed on the public-facing pages reviewed.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Auto and RV loan rates starting at 3.49%, competitive in current market
No-closing-cost mortgage options available with 15 or 30-year fixed terms
Mortgage financing up to 97% LTV through lending partners for primary residences
First-time homebuyer programs with FICOs as low as 620 (below typical 640-660 minimums)
Certificate accounts offering up to 4.02% APY for savings vehicles
Full-service offerings including auto loans, personal loans, business loans, mortgages, and deposit products
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Houston Heights and Stephenville, Texas only
Personal loan rates starting at 10.75% are higher than many online lenders or credit union alternatives
Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility requirements or how to qualify for membership
Money market yields at 0.95% lag behind high-yield savings accounts offered by online banks (typically 4%+)
No information provided on auto loan terms, loan amounts, or detailed eligibility criteria beyond rates
best_for: Texas residents in Houston Heights or Stephenville seeking relationship-based mortgage lending
First-time homebuyers with credit scores below 640 who struggle to qualify at traditional lenders
Local borrowers seeking auto or RV financing with competitive sub-4% rates
Business owners in served Texas communities needing commercial or business lending
diagnosis: Members Trust Federal Credit Union is best for Texas-based consumers in Houston Heights or Stephenville seeking personalized, community-focused banking with particularly strong value in mortgage lending for first-time buyers with lower credit scores. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—membership and services are available only to those in the two served Texas markets, making it unsuitable for borrowers outside these areas or those prioritizing online-only banking nationwide.
services: Mortgage loans - conventional, construction, refinance, cash-out refinance
Certificate of deposit accounts (up to 4.02% APY)
Mortgage services through in-house lending and partner lenders
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
